examples.text: وَلَكُمْ فِيهَا جَمَالٌ حِينَ تُرِيحُونَ وَحِينَ تَسْرَحُونَ
examples.english: There is in them [cattle] a beauty for you when you bring them home for rest and when you drive them forth to pasture.

senses.gloss: a male given name, Jamal or Gamal

etymology.text:
Verbal noun of جَمُلَ (jamula, “to be beautiful”).

Inflected form.

Occupational noun derived from جَمَل (jamal, “camel”).
